title: Python if-else and Nested if-else Flowchart
description: A flowchart demonstrating the decision-making process of if, elif, else, and nested conditional statements in Python.
relationships: Condition 1 True leads to Action Block A
Condition 2 True leads to a nested check: Condition 3
Condition 2 False leads to Action Block D (else)
Condition 3 True leads to Action Block B
Condition 3 False leads to Action Block C
All Action Blocks lead to End
